environment.timing_scope: ComfyUI API queue to output available in history

source_policy.statement: All newly published non-commerce inputs are synthetic demonstrations generated locally. No private third-party source or derivative is included.

runs.timing_class: historical local ComfyUI output; exact queue timing was not retained
runs.prompt: Create an Etsy scale-context product photo. Keep the exact ALEX'S ROOM sign artwork, text, shape, and proportions unchanged. Place it on a warm neutral desk with a wooden ruler beside it and a simple coffee cup in the background, realistic perspective, natural shadows, polished marketplace photography.
runs.provenance: The raw local ComfyUI PNG contained the API graph, prompt, source hash, model, sampler, steps, and seed. Publication stripped PNG text metadata without changing pixels; both raw and published hashes are recorded.

runs.timing_class: warm varied prompt
runs.decision: rejected after review: attractive scene but redesigned organizer geometry

runs.timing_class: warm varied prompt
runs.prompt: Create a bright imaginative product photograph of the exact rocket organizer from the reference without changing it. Preserve all colors, outlines, fins, window, flame, dimensions, print layers, and current contents. Put it on a clean craft table in a tasteful space-themed reading nook with a small blank notebook and a few crayons, softly blurred planets as wall decor far behind. Natural daylight, realistic grounding shadow, subtle depth of field, calm composition, no clutter. No text, people, hands, duplicate containers, extra openings, or altered product geometry.
runs.decision: selected by the author as rocket candidate R2 and used for the source-to-result comparison

runs.prompt: Turn image 1 into a clean premium Etsy hero photograph. Preserve the exact personalized kids room sign artwork, colors, rounded rectangle shape, and the readable text ALEX'S ROOM. Remove the granite countertop. Show the full sign centered on a seamless warm white studio surface, photographed from a natural slight angle. Make it look like a real physical plaque with subtle edge thickness, soft contact shadow, clean commercial lighting, crisp texture, generous margins, no props, no extra text.
runs.decision: selected by visual review as Qwen example Q1

runs.model: Native Qwen Image Edit 2511 mixed FP8
runs.timing_class: historical full-quality native graph; exact queue timing was not retained
runs.prompt: Turn image 1 into a realistic Etsy lifestyle photo showing the product in use. Preserve the exact personalized kids room sign artwork, colors, rounded rectangle shape, and readable text ALEX'S ROOM. Mount the sign naturally on a cream child's bedroom door or wall at eye level. Add a softly blurred cozy space-themed child's room in the background with warm light, subtle star decor, bedding, and toys. Make the sign physically attached to the door or wall with natural shadows and correct scale. Keep the full sign visible, no extra text.
runs.decision: selected by visual review as Qwen example Q2

runs.model: Native Qwen Image Edit 2511 mixed FP8

Remove the granite countertop. Place the sign leaning naturally against a wrapped gift box on a warm kitchen counter with soft holiday lights and small festive decor in the background. Realistic product photography, correct scale, edge thickness, contact shadows, warm cozy lighting, full sign visible, no extra text.
runs.decision: selected by visual review as Qwen example Q3

runs.prompt: Restore this exact archival railway-depot photograph while preserving the architecture, camera position, monochrome character, period details, tracks, storefront geometry, and original composition. Remove every paper crease, tear, scratch, dust spot, stain, edge silvering, and scanner artifact. Reconstruct only the missing photographic emulsion from surrounding evidence. Recover balanced black-and-white tonal detail and clean paper edges. Do not colorize, sepia-tone, modernize, crop, warp, add people, alter the building, or invent readable text. The output must look like a professionally restored museum scan of the same undamaged negative, not a photograph of damaged paper.

selection_review.sign_scale_context: Selected from the original local FLUX.2 Klein experiments. The raw ComfyUI output hash and generation settings are retained in this manifest; the published copy is metadata-sanitized. Its exact historical queue timing was not recovered and is deliberately not claimed.
selection_review.rocket: The candidate was visually polished but later rejected because it redesigned the organizer geometry. It is retained only as a failure example.
selection_review.featured_flux_rocket_gallery: Candidates R2, R13, and R20 were selected by the author as the strongest FLUX.2 Klein rocket-organizer results. R2 is paired directly with the published owned source; R13 and R20 show two additional buyer-relevant room directions.
selection_review.featured_flux_product_gallery: Candidates U8, U9, O5, O7, and O12 were selected by the author from the owned-product review. They extend the FLUX showcase beyond the rocket with two unicorn scenes and three owl scenes while keeping the underlying source photographs private.
selection_review.featured_qwen_gallery: Examples Q1, Q2, and Q3 are retained as the 40-step native Qwen quality target. Q9 demonstrates the later optimized Qwen route on a second product.
selection_review.failure_gallery: The compact article gallery preserves four distinct failure modes: severe artifacts, personalized text/artwork drift, soft geometry, and an attractive but materially redesigned product.
selection_review.restoration: Both FLUX edits retained too much physical damage and were rejected. The Qwen edit removed the scan artifacts while preserving the depot composition and was selected.
selection_review.game-concept: Candidate 2 selected for the strongest silhouette, restrained material wear, and clean grounding shadow.
selection_review.synthetic-data: Candidate 2 selected because all defining valve components remained visible under the adverse lighting condition.
selection_review.confidential-design: Candidate 2 selected for cleaner industrial-design surfacing and a more legible charging puck.
selection_review.presentation-visual: Candidate 2 selected for clearer energy paths and usable blank space. Factual labels remain a deterministic post-process responsibility.
selection_review.offline-creative: Candidate 2 selected for the strongest paper-and-gouache transformation while preserving the lighthouse, sailboat, moon, stars, island, and palette.
